_comment: Gatekeeper rejection rules for doc_pipeline. Each rule has: detect[], condition (optional), threshold (optional), action.

multi_column_layout.description: Text blocks that do not flow top-to-bottom in a single column — typically two-column or three-column resume layouts. Detected by y-position not monotonically increasing and large horizontal x_offset jumps between consecutive blocks.

tables_and_textboxes.description: Grid or table-like structures. Docling marks these as TableBlock. Content inside cells is often skill meters or visual ratings — ignored without context.

complex_shapes.description: SVG paths, decorative dividers, geometric backgrounds. No extractable text.

background_graphics.description: Text rendered over a busy background — OCR confidence will be low and content unreliable.

headers_footers.description: Lines that appear identically on every page (headers/footers, page numbers). Deduplicated across pages.

icons_without_text.description: Small image elements (social icons, checkmarks, bullets as images) with no readable text adjacent. Carry no semantic value.

skill_meters.description: Graphical skill level indicators (star ratings, ring charts, bar meters). Rejected unless adjacent plain text provides a numeric or label equivalent that can be normalised.
skill_meters.note: If text label 'Python - Expert' exists beside the bar → text is kept; bar is ignored.

image_only_elements.description: Company logos, candidate photos, certification badge images. No extractable text.

generic_phrases.description: Filler adjectives with no concrete supporting evidence in the same sentence or paragraph.
generic_phrases.note: 'Passionate about machine learning — 3 Kaggle top-10 finishes' is accepted because evidence exists.

keyword_stuffing.description: More than 25 skills listed in a flat comma-separated block with no context, grouping, or experience mapping.

boilerplate_text.description: GDPR/privacy notices, 'This resume is confidential', or template placeholder text.

empty_sections.description: A section heading (e.g. 'AWARDS') followed by no content or only whitespace.

low_quality_ocr.description: PaddleOCR confidence per word below 0.60. Broken words like 'E X P E R I E N C E' or random symbols.

scanned_resume_only.description: PDF has no selectable text layer at all — pure scan. Route entire document to PaddleOCR.

non_text_layers.description: PDFs with glyph encoding errors (Private Use Area codepoints > U+E000) or garbled characters exceeding 30% of page text.

signal_definitions.irregular_line_order: y_position of consecutive text blocks is not monotonically increasing (regression > 10 px)
signal_definitions.x_axis_jump: horizontal offset between consecutive blocks exceeds 200 px in a single-column context
signal_definitions.repeated_lines: identical text string appears on 2+ pages at the same y-offset
signal_definitions.random_characters: token contains >40% non-alphanumeric characters excluding punctuation
